## CreateMarketParams type

Union type for creating a standalone market or permissionless cpmm market with pool.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare type CreateMarketParams<C extends RpcContext<MS>, MS extends MetadataStorage> = (CreateStandaloneMarketParams<C, MS> | CreateMarketWithPoolParams<C, MS>) & TransactionHooks;
```
